creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Apr 17, 2007 at 21:30:23 -0500, Josh Paetzel wrote:
> You might want to coordinate with mi@ on this one, he and I discussed
> making some changes to the port privately, I guess I wasn't aware he
> had committed changes to it already.
> 
> At any rate, we're sort of half-way in between something with the port
> as it is now...the old rc script is gone but the installation stuff
> for it is still in the Makefile, causing the error.  The rnNG script I
> wrote is in files/ but there's no goo to install it.  The patch the pr
> submitter sent gets rid of the error, but doesn't take care of
> installing the new rc script either, so that can't be used as is.  I
> guess ideally mi@ would finish up his work on it and get things all
> fixed up.
> 

Hello Josh,

Thanks for your notification.

Mikhail, may I pass this PR to you?  Since you are more familiar with
this issue.  Hope you don't mind that I step in this.

-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
